meaning: n.大厦,官邸,公寓(用复数,用于专有名词中)
examples: The mansion has been put up for sale.
His new luxury mansion was a world away from the tiny house where he was born.
I spent two nights in the mansion .
Its 31 rooms in a converted mansion include eight with direct views of the plaza.
Artists have painted wall murals in the rooms and hallways, and the 1850s mansion is a surreal backdrop.
